svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.6 Chrome/144.0.7559.236 Electron/40.8.4 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="beF1RwCU_Znudj82kRXR" name="Trang-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="1426" dy="841" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" background="none" math="0" shadow="1"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="User Query" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="430" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Router
(llama3.1:8b)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="390" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Retrieve QnA
(Pinecone)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="120" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Web Search
(Tavily)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="430" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Chitchat" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="760" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Relevant Context Checker" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="240" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Augment" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="280" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NVvAzkW2nSlh3--ghvmR-34" edge="1" parent="1" source="9" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;curved=0;" target="NVvAzkW2nSlh3--ghvmR-32"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="840" y="480" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Web Search
(fallback)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="600" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Generate
(llama3.1:8b)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="435" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="Response" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="680" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="4" value="QnA"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="5" value="Web"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="23" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="200" y="480" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="25" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#00aa00;" target="8" value="YES"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="27" edge="1" parent="1" source="7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#ff0000;" target="9" value="NO"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="29" edge="1" parent="1" x="840" y="700" /> <mxPoint x="515" y="700" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="840" y="560" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" edge="1" parent="1" source="8" as="points"> <mxPoint x="990" y="640" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="993" y="340" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="595" y="640" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NVvAzkW2nSlh3--ghvmR-32"
